hypothesis: Add-on-only 35pct cap headroom failed materiality because newly executable add-ons may have identifiable adverse-outcome contexts; measuring those contexts should tell whether the follow-through add-on branch needs a stronger trigger or should wait for forward evidence.
single_causal_variable: add-on-only cap headroom newly executed add-on adverse outcome taxonomy
locked_variables: add-on-only cap headroom newly executed add-on adverse outcome taxonomy
acceptance_rule: observed_only; must produce a reproducible adverse-outcome taxonomy for add-on-only cap-headroom newly executed add-ons and identify whether future trigger work has enough sample support
